title: Effect of Praneem polyherbal formulations against Infection of HPV in Uterine cervix.
condition:
The study is conducted in women with 

1) HPV infection with inflammatory lesions and LSIL. 

2) HPV positive lesions (both cytologically and molecularly or only molecularly).
,
inclusion_criteria: Adult females in reproductive age group of 30 years or more with HPV infection or inflammatory lesions.
exclusion_criteria:
1) Pregnant Women
2) Patient with menstrual irregularities and any tumor or other concomitant therapies.
locations: Cancer Clinic, Department of Obstetrics & Gynae
